title: Ashen Corpse Compat
description: A compatibility resource pack between Ashen and Corpse
body:
#

This addon modifies the GUI to better fit the Ashen resource pack style while ensuring compatibility with the Corpse mod.

If you encounter any issues, please contact me (Ardopia) on the GitHub Repo. Do not report these issues to Ashen Owner, as this is just a fan-made addon and is not officially affiliated with the main Ashen resourcepack.

CREDITS

Aim_Boot – Ashen resourcepack

Corpse mod by henkelmax
